legal.impressumIntro: Provider identification pursuant to applicable transparency obligations.
legal.impressumPlaceholder: [TO COMPLETE: full name / company, street and number, postcode city, email address] — This information must be accurate and complete before public launch.
legal.dsIntro: This privacy policy explains how Rintakez collects, processes and protects personal data. It applies to all users of the platform rintakez.ch and is governed by the revised Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (revFADP / nFADP).
legal.dsData: We collect and process the following data: Upon registration, your email address and password (stored encrypted). In your profile: display name, role (client or photographer), city, canton, language, biography and an optional avatar. Photographers additionally provide their specialties, coverage cantons, an optional hourly rate, website and Instagram links, and portfolio images. Clients post shoots with a title, brief, location, date and budget. Photographers submit bids with an amount and a message.
legal.dsPurpose: The data collected is used exclusively to operate the marketplace: providing and managing user accounts, connecting clients and photographers, displaying profiles and portfolios, and processing shoots and bids. Data is not shared with third parties for advertising purposes.
legal.dsProcessor: We use Supabase as our technical service provider (Supabase, Inc., USA, available at supabase.com). Supabase handles database services, authentication and file storage. Data is stored and processed in the Zürich region, Switzerland. Processing is carried out under a data processing agreement in compliance with the revFADP.
legal.dsRights: You have the right at any time to request access to your stored data, to correct inaccurate information, and to request deletion of your account and associated data. You may exercise these rights via the contact address below. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
legal.dsContactPlaceholder: [TO COMPLETE: data protection contact email address] — This information must be accurate before public launch.
legal.agbIntro: These terms govern use of the Rintakez platform. By registering, you accept them.
legal.agbReviewNote: Template — have it reviewed by a professional before public launch.
legal.agbS1B: These terms apply to all users of rintakez.ch, both clients and photographers.
legal.agbS2B: Rintakez is an intermediary marketplace. We connect clients with photographers but are not a party to the individual shoot contract.
legal.agbS3B: An account is required. Your details must be true and current. Credentials must be kept confidential.
legal.agbS4B: Clients post shoots; photographers submit offers and carry out shoots. Each role follows the applicable rules.
legal.agbS5B: When a client accepts an offer, the contract is formed directly between the client and the photographer. Rintakez is not a party to it.
legal.agbS6B: The current fee structure is shown transparently before any paid use. [To be completed before launch.]
legal.agbS7B: You keep the rights to your uploaded content and grant Rintakez the right to display it to present your profile or shoot.
legal.agbS8B: Unlawful, offensive or misleading content, spam, and circumventing the platform to avoid fees are prohibited.
legal.agbS9B: Rintakez is not liable for the photography service itself. Liability is limited, to the extent permitted by law, to intent and gross negligence.
legal.agbS10B: You may delete your account at any time. We may amend these terms and will inform you in good time. Swiss law applies; place of jurisdiction is the operator's seat.
legal.dsSubprocessors: We share data with carefully selected providers that help us run the platform: Supabase (database, authentication, file storage), Vercel (hosting), Resend (sending notification emails), and Plausible Analytics (anonymous, cookieless usage statistics) where enabled. These providers process data solely on our behalf.
legal.dsRetention: We keep personal data only as long as needed to operate the marketplace. You can delete your account at any time; your profile data, shoots, bids, messages and files are removed. Reviews may remain in anonymised form.
legal.dsCookies: We use only technically necessary cookies for sign-in (session). No tracking or advertising cookies are set; the optional usage analytics (Plausible) works without cookies.
